story_summary: Boxwell returns to repair the church regulator at Harrow Fen, corroborating that he is a patient travelling clockmaker who carries his teacher's cedar tool case.

entities.summary: A patient travelling clockmaker who carries a cedar case of tools.
entities.evidence_excerpt: A clockmaker's reputation travels faster than a clockmaker.

entities.summary: A fog-bound village with a church regulator clock.
entities.evidence_excerpt: the village of Harrow Fen had been waiting for him

claims.evidence_excerpt: When a boy asked how long he had been a clockmaker...
cedar case strapped to his back

chunks.title: Continuity: The Regulator's Apprentice
chunks.body: Previous story summary: Boxwell repaired the church regulator at Harrow Fen and revealed the cedar tool case belonged to his teacher.
